name: vifixa-ai-tests
description: Test suite for Vifixa AI Business Package

scripts.test:supabase: cd supabase/functions && for dir in */; do if [ -f "$dir/test.ts" ]; then echo "Testing $dir..."; /Users/lha/.deno/bin/deno test "$dir/test.ts" --allow-net --allow-env --no-check; fi; done
scripts.test:all: npm run test:supabase && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:web
scripts.deploy:supabase: supabase db push && supabase functions deploy
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:supabase && npm run deploy:web
